title: ANSI Z535.4:2023 Product Safety Signs and Labels
scope_one_line: Format, colour, symbol, and content requirements for product safety signs + labels — the canonical sign-format spec referenced by NFPA 70E §130.5(H) for arc-flash labels
license_note: Clause references + brief paraphrase only — never full standard text. Safety colours (Pantone codes) are factual + reproduced for interoperation.
blocked_by_sprint_priority: Promote stub → production when electrical/arc-flash-labelling enters active development (after arc-flash skill + clause_ref retrofit).
